title: LowPizzi Evangelion [Collab Entry]
description:
Watch the Collab RIGHT NOW: https://youtu.be/rA3lMYCXKNc
I spent so much time and effort in this that i thought the right decision was uploading it on this channel. The visuals are entirely made on Adobe After Effects, that's my first time using it properly, learned a lot thanks to this collab. Audio made on Sony Vegas ofc, NO BGM.
For the guys who wanted a new vid from me, don't worry, in 2019 i'll make much more fresh content here, i'm not dead as you see.

#YTPMV
